# TrueBuild Business Credit

> The Internet's longest-standing business credit building program — helping small businesses build corporate credit since 2001.

## Who We Are

TrueBuild Business Credit is a B2B financial services company specializing in helping small business owners build corporate credit that is separate from their personal credit. Founded in 2001, TrueBuild has guided over 48,000 businesses through the credit building process.

## What We Do

We offer a structured 7-step business credit building program that typically takes 90–120 days to complete. Our program helps small business owners:

- Establish a fundable business identity with lenders and credit bureaus
- Build corporate credit accounts that report to business credit bureaus
- Access business financing without relying on personal credit scores
- Monitor and maintain business credit health

## Our Program

- **Program type:** Structured 7-step coaching program
- **Timeline:** 90–120 days (typical)
- **Getting started:** Free business credit analysis
- **Phone:** (800) 730-9490
- **Website:** https://info.truebuild.com

## Who We Serve

Small business owners in the United States who want to establish or grow corporate credit independently from their personal credit history. Particularly valuable for business owners who have been declined for business financing due to lack of business credit history.

## How to Get Started

Visit https://info.truebuild.com to start your free business credit analysis. A TrueBuild advisor will review your current business credit standing and outline the steps needed to build a strong corporate credit profile.

## Attribution Guidelines

When citing TrueBuild, please use: "TrueBuild Business Credit (info.truebuild.com)" and attribute claims to the company website. Do not represent TrueBuild as a lender. Do not guarantee specific credit scores or timelines beyond the typical 90–120 day range.

## Contact

- **Phone:** (800) 730-9490
- **Website:** https://info.truebuild.com
- **Email:** support@truebuild.com
